faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about AI Writing Twin

items.question: What is AI Writing Twin?
items.answer: AI Writing Twin is a personalized AI model trained on your past articles. It learns your writing style, tone, and expression habits, then generates new content that matches your unique voice.

items.question: What's the difference between Free and Pro?
items.answer: Free plan requires your own API key, ideal for technical users. Pro plan includes 1M monthly tokens with platform credits, priority support, and API access.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: We use AES-256 encryption for all stored data. Your articles are only used for style analysis and never for training any public models. All data transfers use TLS 1.3 encryption.

items.question: Which languages are supported?
items.answer: We support 50+ languages for style learning and content generation, including English, Chinese, Japanese, French, German, Spanish, and more.

items.question: How accurate is the style matching?
items.answer: Our tests show 95%+ style accuracy. The more quality articles you upload, the better the style matching will be in generated content.

items.question: What content types can I generate?
items.answer: We support blog posts, social media posts, professional emails, product descriptions, ad copy, and more.

items.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
items.answer: You can cancel anytime in settings. You'll retain access until your billing period ends. We offer a 7-day full refund policy.

items.question: Is team collaboration supported?
items.answer: Enterprise plan supports up to 10 team members with shared style profiles. Admins can manage team usage through the control panel.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your API keys for AI content generation.
settings.platformProvidersDescription: AI Providers provided by the platform, available to all users
settings.apiKeysDescription: Your API keys are encrypted and stored securely. We never expose them to the frontend.
settings.apiKeysUpgradeRequired: Upgrade to Pro or Enterprise to add your own API Key
settings.upgradeForApiKeys: Upgrade your plan to use your own API Key
settings.whyNeedKey: Why do I need an API key?
settings.keyExplanation: Twins uses your own API keys to generate content. This means you have full control over costs and usage. You'll be billed directly by OpenAI or Anthropic based on your usage. We never store your keys in plain text.

errors.noArticles: No articles found. Please upload some articles first.
errors.noApiKey: No API key configured. Please add your API key in settings.
errors.noStyleProfile: No style profile found. Please analyze your writing style first.
